headline: Carnival Corporation Explores Guest Spending Upside With Princess POURS Rollout
summary: Princess Cruises, part of Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL), has introduced the POURS beverage program across its global fleet. The program creates a unified drinks identity and expands both alcoholic and nonalcoholic options focused on premium and wellness offerings. This rollout represents a refresh of onboard guest experience that goes beyond ship hardware and design. Carnival Corporation, through Princess Cruises and its other brands, operates in a cruise sector where guest...
